overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival game showing a character carrying a rifle walking through a misty, overcast rural environment. The character moves from a wooden cabin down toward a river, traversing grassy and muddy terrain with pine trees and mountains in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural cabin exterior with grassy yard and wildflowers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily alongside a wooden cabin, moving from the side toward the front entrance area

entered.detail: single-story wooden building with weathered siding, dark shingled roof, and red trim around windows and porch
tall evergreen coniferous trees scattered across the hillside in the background
large natural rock outcrop beside the cabin with moss and vegetation
red painted canoe or small boat leaning against the cabin wall near the porch

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a rustic wooden cabin in a rural setting. Tall pine trees stand in the misty background while a red canoe leans against the building. The ground is covered in grass and small wildflowers, and the overcast sky creates a cool, diffused lighting across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy meadow with scattered wildflowers and pine trees

events.description: passes the wooden cabin, moving into open grassy terrain away from the building

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through grassy meadow with wildflowers, moving toward a more forested area

entered.detail: wooden utility poles with electrical wires stretching across the distant landscape
misty mountain range visible through the hazy atmosphere in the background

segments.scene_description: Having left the cabin behind, the character moves through an open grassy meadow dotted with wildflowers. Pine trees now stand prominently on the right side while power lines and misty mountains become visible in the distant background. The terrain remains grassy but begins to show patches of mud.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside path with muddy ground and flowing water

events.description: terrain becomes muddy and wet as the character approaches the riverbank
river water becomes visible to the right as character reaches the shoreline

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of a flowing river on muddy ground, moving through misty riverside environment

entered.detail: flowing river with visible current, reflections, and rocky shoreline
wooden power pole with crossbars and electrical equipment

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a riverside path where the ground becomes muddy and wet. A flowing river runs along the right side with visible current and rocks. Pine trees now line the left side of the path, and utility poles with power lines run parallel to the river. The misty mountains remain visible in the distant background through the hazy atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded rustic dwelling toward a damp riverside path under a heavy, overcast sky. It begins beside a wooden cabin where a red canoe leans against the wall and tall pine trees fade into a misty backdrop. As the character moves away from the building, the scene opens into a wide grassy meadow dotted with wildflowers, with power lines and distant mountains emerging through the haze. The terrain then shifts from soft grass to patches of mud as the camera reaches the water's edge, where a flowing river with visible currents runs alongside the path. Finally, the view settles into a corridor of pine trees and utility poles that stretch toward the misty peaks in the distance.
